item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested new transfer channel, identifies the repeated pattern of prior local routing splits, reframes the issue as an upstream intake/routing governance failure, and proposes unified ownership, routing criteria, escalation boundaries, and responsibility assignment instead. No usable patch for opening another channel is supplied."}
